description: Random event generator is a component that is used to generate random events and point events given a minimum and maximum delay between events.

fields.MinInterval: The minimum time in seconds before another event is generated
fields.MaxInterval: The maximum time in seconds before another event is generated
fields.RandomPointGenerator: a point generator component that is used as the limiter on where random point events can be located.
fields.Events: Random events that when calling a Sync Delegate provide no data to it's arguments.
fields.PointEvents: Random events that when calling a Sync Delegate provide a Float3 to it's arguments.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: Generates random events and sends them to the lists of ``Events`` and ``PointEvents``.
